taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Advanced analytics, Data science, Business intelligence, Data engineering, SQL
skill_match_scores: Advanced analytics:1.0, Data science:1.0, Business intelligence:0.0, Data engineering:1.0, SQL:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's or graduate degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Business, or a related field, 3+ years of hands-on experience in advanced analytics, data science, business intelligence, or data engineering roles, Strong expertise in SQL, Python, Spark, and cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP), Demonstrable experience in building scalable data pipelines, advanced dashboards, and executive-level reporting (Power BI, Tableau, Adobe Workspace), Demonstrated track record of developing and deploying ML/AI models in production environments, Solid understanding of SaaS business models and Customer Success domains (renewals, adoption, churn, value realization), Superb communication skills with the ability to clearly explain complex analysis to senior and non-technical audiences, Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple initiatives and deliver outcomes in fast-paced environments
core_responsibilities: Own end-to-end development of advanced analytics, dashboards, and data products focused on customer success metrics such as renewals, adoption, churn risk, NDR, and value realization, Translate complex datasets into clear, compelling narratives and actionable recommendations for senior leaders and partners across multiple functions, Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines integrating large datasets across subscription, services, usage, and customer health domains, Ensure data quality, consistency, and governance to support reliable, enterprise-grade analytics and reporting, Develop and deploy predictive and prescriptive models to surface churn risk, expansion signals, and consumption health, Build and operationalize ML- and LLM-powered insight workflows and agents that automate analysis and enable next-best-action recommendations, Create executive-ready dashboards and reports using Power BI (and related tools), optimized for clarity, performance, and decision-making, Embed advanced metrics, forecasting, and insights generated by machine learning directly into analytics experiences, Partner closely with Customer Success, Engineering, Professional Services, Sales Operations, and Product teams to align analytics solutions with business priorities, Act as a trusted analytics advisor, influencing decisions through data rather than formal authority
job_summary: Adobe is a leading company empowering creativity and productivity through innovative platforms and tools. They are seeking a Business Intelligence Analyst to design and scale analytics solutions that provide actionable insights across customer experience orchestration, focusing on advanced analytics, data engineering, and AI/ML.
